---
title: Bibliography
---

```{r, biblist, include = FALSE}
BIB <- bibtex::read.bib(package = "surveillance")
BIB <- BIB[lengths(BIB$annote) > 0]
biblist <- split(BIB, BIB$journal == "Journal of Statistical Software")

writedl <- function (terms, descriptions) {
    writeLines(c(
        "<dl>",
        paste0("<dt>", terms, "</dt>\n",
               "<dd>", descriptions, "</dd>"),
        "</dl>"), sep = "\n\n")
}
```

## Main JSS references

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
writedl(biblist[[2]]$annote, format(biblist[[2]], "html"))
```

## Some methodological papers

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
writedl(biblist[[1]]$annote, format(biblist[[1]], "html"))
```
